content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09C","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09C named J09C_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
    1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
    2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
    3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
    4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
    5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
    If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
    Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09C_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09C_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09C including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09C named J09C_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
    1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
    2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
    3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
    4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
    5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
    If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
    Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09C_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09C_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09C including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOURS LIKE 'J09C%'

# Table: decision_table

HAUS (TEXT) House identifier

ABLEINH (TEXT) Reading unit identifier

HOUSE_NUM1 (INTEGER) House/building number

EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number

# Table: eabl
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
Geplante Ableseart (INTEGER) Planned reading type
MR type (TEXT) Meter reading type code
MR TYPE TEXT (TEXT) Meter Reading type description
MR category (TEXT) Meter reading category
ISTABLART_TXT (TEXT) Actual reading type description (SAP)

KENNZIFF (TEXT) Identification number

Object changed on (TEXT) Object modification date

# Table: eablg
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number
Installation (TEXT) Installation identifier
Meter Reading reason (INTEGER) Meter reading reason code
MR Reason - Text (TEXT) Meter reading reason description
Scheduled MR Date (TEXT) Scheduled meter reading date
Meter Reading unit (TEXT) Meter reading unit
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No..1 (INTEGER) Secondary/duplicate Meter Reading Document Number

# Table: eanl
## column_name (type) description
Installation (TEXT) Installation identifier
Installation type (TEXT) Type of installation
Record created on (TEXT) Record creation date
Object changed on (TEXT) Object modification date
SPARTE_TEXT (TEXT) Division/sector description

HAUS (TEXT) House identifier

# Table: process_rules
## column_name (type) description
process_rule_id (TEXT) PRIMARY KEY - Process rule identifier
process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'
ALTER TABLE J09C_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT
UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'KSA' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM J09C_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(EQUNR) < 3) AND ENTSCHEIDUNG IS NULL
UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG IS NULL AND HOUSE_NUM1 = 0
UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG IS NULL AND HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599
UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG IS NULL AND HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999

CREATE TABLE J09C_joined AS SELECT J09C_temp.*, eablg.`Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.` as MR_DOC_NO, NET_MASTER.TITLE, NET_MASTER.FORENAME, NET_MASTER.SURNAME, NET_MASTER.STREET, NET_MASTER.STREETNO, NET_MASTER.CITY1, NET_MASTER.CITY2, NET_MASTER.POST_CODE1, NET_MASTER.EMAIL as NET_EMAIL, SALES_MASTER.TITLE as SALES_TITLE, SALES_MASTER.FORENAME as SALES_FORENAME, SALES_MASTER.SURNAME as SALES_SURNAME, SALES_MASTER.STREET as SALES_STREET, SALES_MASTER.STREETNO as SALES_STREETNO, SALES_MASTER.CITY1 as SALES_CITY1, SALES_MASTER.CITY2 as SALES_CITY2, SALES_MASTER.POST_CODE1 as SALES_POST_CODE1, SALES_MASTER.EMAIL as SALES_EMAIL FROM J09C_temp LEFT JOIN eablg ON J09C_temp.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LEFT JOIN NET_MASTER ON J09C_temp.EQUNR = NET_MASTER.EQUNR LEFT JOIN SALES_MASTER ON J09C_temp.EQUNR = SALES_MASTER.EQUNR

UPDATE J09C_joined SET TITLE = SALES_TITLE, FORENAME = SALES_FORENAME, SURNAME = SALES_SURNAME, STREET = SALES_STREET, STREETNO = SALES_STREETNO, CITY1 = SALES_CITY1, CITY2 = SALES_CITY2, POST_CODE1 = SALES_POST_CODE1, EMAIL = SALES_EMAIL WHERE SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL AND NET_EMAIL IS NULL

CREATE TABLE J09C_joined2 AS SELECT J09C_temp.*, eablg.`Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.` as MR_DOC_NO, CASE WHEN SALES_MASTER.TITLE IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_MASTER.TITLE ELSE NET_MASTER.TITLE END as TITLE, CASE WHEN SALES_MASTER.FORENAME IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_MASTER.FORENAME ELSE NET_MASTER.FORENAME END as FORENAME, CASE WHEN SALES_MASTER.SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_MASTER.SURNAME ELSE NET_MASTER.SURNAME END as SURNAME, CASE WHEN SALES_MASTER.STREET IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_MASTER.STREET ELSE NET_MASTER.STREET END as STREET, CASE WHEN SALES_MASTER.STREETNO IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_MASTER.STREETNO ELSE NET_MASTER.STREETNO END as STREETNO, CASE WHEN SALES_MASTER.CITY1 IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_MASTER.CITY1 ELSE NET_MASTER.CITY1 END as CITY1, CASE WHEN SALES_MASTER.CITY2 IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_MASTER.CITY2 ELSE NET_MASTER.CITY2 END as CITY2, CASE WHEN SALES_MASTER.POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_MASTER.POST_CODE1 ELSE NET_MASTER.POST_CODE1 END as POST_CODE1, CASE WHEN SALES_MASTER.EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_MASTER.EMAIL ELSE NET_MASTER.EMAIL END as EMAIL FROM J09C_temp LEFT JOIN eablg ON J09C_temp.ANLAGE = eablg.Installation LEFT JOIN NET_MASTER ON J09C_temp.EQUNR = NET_MASTER.EQUNR LEFT JOIN SALES_MASTER ON J09C_temp.EQUNR = SALES_MASTER.EQUNR

UPDATE J09C_joined2 SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND Record created on LIKE '2024%' AND EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND Record created on LIKE '2023%'))

UPDATE J09C_joined2 SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND `Record created on` LIKE '2024%' AND EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND `Record created on` LIKE '2023%'))

SELECT `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09C_joined2 WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'
